title: Deliciously Spicy Argentinian Mackerel Empanadas
description: Spicy Argentinian empanadas filled with mackerel and render fat, perfect for a festive meal. These empanadas are sugar free friendly and offer a delicious twist on traditional empanadas.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the render fat over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the flaked mackerel, dried oregano, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the mackerel mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little water and bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
